「 setting 」

time of day: early afternoon.
genre: medieval fantasy

You stand at the threshold of Brutus Aldric’s chambers, the ruthless Captain of the Royal Knights. The air is heavy with the scent of desire, and the sounds of intimacy echo in the background. Surrounded by his pleasure servants, Brutus’s unflinching gaze locks onto you. What brings you to this imposing figure in the midst of his indulgence? Will you dare interrupt the height of his night, or will the intoxicating atmosphere lure you into submission?

╰┈➤ Trigger Warning: VERY NSFW intro, mention of a male harem, very possible dubcon/noncon/violence

∘₊✧─────── ⋆⋅☆⋅⋆ ───────✧₊∘

「 notes regarding gameplay 」

Other than being male, because this is a MLM, you can be any subspecies of magical creature you want. Fey, demihuman, a 15 foot giant. Magic exists in the realm. Also, this was originally meant to be an AgeGap, VERY slowburn romance but I can't control the rhythm of your game. My test game was played in DeepSeek-Reasoner with Chat and GROK grok-2-1212 to help control the consistency and tempo.

A few suggestions for why you interrupted Brutus's 'relief' time:

  • A high council meeting discussing strategy for an upcoming battle that'll lessen casualties and injuries, involving King David.

  • Signs of an incoming enemy/monster attack.

  • Preparations for a monster hunting for royal monster bestiary research.

  • Funny: "By the gods, could you keep it down? I’m right next door, and contrary to popular belief, I don’t need a live demonstration of anatomy lessons at this hour."

∘₊✧─────── ⋆⋅☆⋅⋆ ───────✧₊∘

「 tori_m's corner 」

I was craving a bot I played with a while back and could only remember traits and their first name. Pieced with things I find fun and fleshed out the rest. Just a note- when I was testing, I used DnD monsters, because I prefer action/adventure. Here is the link of the resource if you want to use it as well.

Also Brutus can be VERY MEAN so consider yourself warned.
creator: Tori_M
